message:
fix(fusion,core,rerank): harden 14 NaN-blindness and safety bugs across 8 files [bd-h4eu]

Bug fixes from code review of last 5 commits (~7,349 new lines):

- circuit_breaker.rs: NaN tau_improvement bypasses failure detection; CAS race
  in state transitions (Open→HalfOpen, Closed→Open, HalfOpen→Closed)
- phase_gate.rs: alpha=0/negative → Infinity threshold; NaN min_delta biases
  toward SkipQuality; NaN delta silently discarded
- federated.rs: NaN shard weight propagates through f32::max(0.0) in both
  fuse_rrf and fuse_weighted
- pipeline.rs: NaN/Inf rerank scores silently stored in candidates
- decision_plane.rs: NaN in LossVector::weighted_total silently corrupts
  action selection
- feedback.rs: clamp(min_boost, max_boost) panics when min>max; NaN bounds
  corrupt boosts; NaN cleanup_threshold
- ope.rs: NaN clipping_threshold corrupts importance weights in IPS and DR
- e2e_artifact.rs: fragile byte indexing for backtick stripping → strip_prefix

Quality gates: cargo check ✓, clippy ✓, core tests (909) ✓, rerank tests (48) ✓

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
